Task paused and needs input: [Dispatch] x_poster: Investigate and diagnose why x.com fetches are failing or ti
Reason: Step 2 failed verification after 2 retries.
Details: No plan steps were evidenced as complete by this round's tool calls.
Reply in this chat with any adjustment or confirmation, and I will resume the task.
Task ID: 34c4ea6f-018f-4ec7-a16e-ea9b68c83474

Reproduced the issue locally with `curl -v -D C:\tmp\x_headers.txt -o C:\tmp\x_body.txt https://api.x.com/2/tweets?ids=20` and displayed the saved headers/body, showing the API immediately responds with HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized and the JSON payload `{"title":"Unauthorized","type":"about:blank","status":401,"detail":"Unauthorized"}`; the failure is caused by missing or invalid authentication credentials, so supplying valid OAuth/[REDACTED] or API tokens is the concrete fix/workaround to allow successful fetches.
